title: Best Artificial Deluxe Frosted Christmas Garland with Pine Cones & Winter Red Berries (6ft Garland)
features: This Best Artificial Deluxe Frosted Christmas Garland is perfect for any home or business.
Garland measures 180cm (6ft) in length. Beautifully decorated with Red Berries & Pine Cones.
Each Christmas Garland is made with both Pine & Spruce Tips. It has 100 Tips, each measuring 125mm Long and 40mm Wide, giving you a full garland once shaped.
Fire Resistant, for peace of mind. All measurements are approximate.
description: Product Description Select size from drop down menu This Best Artificial Deluxe Frosted Christmas Garland is perfect for any home or business. Beautifully decorated with Red Berries & Pine Cones. Each Christmas Garland is made with both Pine & Spruce Tips. 6ft - 100 tips. 9ft - 150 tips. 12ft - 200 tips. Each tip measuring 125mm Long and 40mm Wide, giving you a full garland once shaped. All measurements are approximate. Fire Resistant, for peace of mind. Can be supplied with Bright White LED Lights. Please note: Lights are not attached to the garland so that they can be set around your decorations. Safety Warning Keep away from open flames and heat sources. Do not use with real candles or other heat sources. If using with LED lights, follow the manufacturer's instructions for safe use and disposal. Do not leave unattended while in use. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
